title: Anachronism Card
description: Schema for a single Anachronism card object. This same schema validates BOTH scraped cards (from the Heard list and other sources) and user-submitted custom cards. That single contract is what makes the in-app 'add card' feature (Milestone 10) trivial: the creator emits the same object the scraper does. Required fields must always be present; everything else is optional and the parser fills documented self-healing defaults, recording any defaulted/faked field names in needs_review.

source.description: Origin of this card record. Current source of truth: spreadsheet-2007.

name.description: Card name. Default "" + flag when unreadable.

element.description: Elemental affiliation. Default "unknown" + flag. Support cards may not print an element the same way; record unknown as appropriate.

set.description: Set number (1-7). For promo cards this is the parent set; see set_label.

set_label.description: Promo-set label ("P1".."P7"). Present only on promo cards; numbered cards omit it.

collector.description: Collector number, preserved verbatim (e.g. "091", "001"). Default "" + flag.

life.description: Warrior stat. null when the source prints no value (NA).

speed.description: Warrior stat. null when the source prints no value (NA).

experience.description: Warrior stat. null when the source prints no value (NA).

damage.description: Attack damage (warriors and weapons). null when the source prints no value (NA).

initiative.description: Support-card initiative. null when the source prints no value (NA).

hands.description: Weapon hands. null when the source prints no value (NA).

weapon_damage.description: Legacy field (Heard source). The spreadsheet folds weapon damage into `damage`; omitted on spreadsheet-2007 records.

salary.description: Warrior point cost ("Salary"). null for non-warriors / NA.

grid_raw.description: Row-major non-empty grid cells, verbatim (marker shown as ▲). "" for support cards.

grid.description: Flat 12-key attack grid (keys 1A..4C). Cell value: a modifier string (e.g. "+1"), "marker" at 3B, or null for empty. null for support cards (no grid).

background.description: Warrior background / historical prose. Often empty for support cards.

tags.description: Mechanical taxonomy (snake_cased spreadsheet columns) -> boolean. null when the source value is NA.

abilities.description: Card abilities. Default [] + flag if none.

needs_review.description: Field names that were defaulted/faked. Empty = clean.

raw_source_text.description: Full original substring for this card, verbatim. Always populated.
